gaps.title: No general Bandit work-item creation command
gaps.rationale: Manual work-item creation remains acceptable during bootstrap, but the gap should be converted once the repeated artifact shape stabilizes.
gaps.next_action: Resolve as its own chore in the post-BANDIT-013 bootstrap-gap lane after higher-priority landing/review gaps are resolved or explicitly dispositioned.

gaps.title: Bootstrap gaps need repo-native tracking and validation
gaps.rationale: BANDIT-011 created the gap ledger, validation path, default init ledger, and list command.
gaps.next_action: Use bandit validate and bandit gaps list during cold starts, closeout, and future bootstrap-gap routing.

gaps.title: Live CodeRabbit polling and repair orchestration unavailable
gaps.rationale: CodeRabbit evidence can be captured manually, but live API polling, PR comment repair orchestration, and rerun automation need later integration work.
gaps.next_action: Resolve as its own chore in the post-BANDIT-013 bootstrap-gap lane after the Landing Agent gap is resolved or explicitly dispositioned.

gaps.title: Live escalated adversarial reviewer routing unavailable
gaps.rationale: The placeholder gate exists; live stronger-reviewer routing needs a later reviewer integration chore with cost and credential boundaries.
gaps.next_action: Resolve as its own chore in the post-BANDIT-013 bootstrap-gap lane after live CodeRabbit integration is resolved or explicitly dispositioned.

gaps.title: No Landing Agent exists yet
gaps.rationale: BANDIT-014 created the repo-native Landing Agent contract, validation path, and local-record landing command that consumes auto-landing eligibility and records landing action evidence while preserving operator-owned UAT and no-remote-operation boundaries.
gaps.next_action: Use bandit land <work-item-id> --action local-record for supported local-record landings; keep live remote merge, push, and deploy behavior out of scope until explicitly specified.

gaps.title: No CLI-owned UAT artifact exists yet
gaps.rationale: BANDIT-012 created the CLI-owned UAT approval artifact, validation path, uat approve command, and stale-UAT land-check enforcement.
gaps.next_action: Use bandit uat approve and land-check UAT freshness checks for future feature-slice landing gates.

gaps.title: No general artifact creation command outside explicit PRD draft-work
gaps.rationale: Work-item briefs, review evidence, landing evidence, retrospectives, and follow-up artifacts are still created manually unless a narrow command exists for that artifact family.
gaps.next_action: Resolve as its own chore in the post-BANDIT-013 bootstrap-gap lane after the general work-item creation command gap is resolved or explicitly dispositioned.

gaps.title: No heartbeat chore-agent exists yet
gaps.rationale: Recurring chore automation should wait until repo-native chore and gate contracts are stronger.
gaps.next_action: Resolve as its own chore in the post-BANDIT-013 bootstrap-gap lane after artifact creation gaps are resolved or explicitly dispositioned.

gaps.title: No workflow cockpit exists yet
gaps.rationale: The cockpit should derive from CLI-owned state after core workflow state and validation paths exist.
gaps.next_action: Resolve as its own chore in the post-BANDIT-013 bootstrap-gap lane after automation-agent gaps are resolved or explicitly dispositioned; do not start broader cockpit work while earlier open gaps remain.
